# programs.fzf

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.fzf.changeDirWidget.bash.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.changeDirWidget.bash.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |

| `programs.fzf.colors` | `attribute set of string` | Color scheme options added to `FZF_DEFAULT_OPTS`. See <https://github.com/junegunn/fzf/wiki/Color-schemes> for documentation. |
| `programs.fzf.defaultCommand` | `null or string` | The command that gets executed as the default source for fzf when running. |
| `programs.fzf.defaultOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options given to fzf by default. |
| `programs.fzf.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable fzf - a command-line fuzzy finder. |
| `programs.fzf.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.fzf.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.fzf.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.fzf.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.bash.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.bash.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.command` | `null or string` | The command that gets executed as the source for fzf for the CTRL-T keybinding. |

| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.nushell.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.options` | `list of string` | Command line options for the CTRL-T keybinding. |
| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.zsh.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.fileWidget.zsh.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.bash.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.bash.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.command` | `null or string` | The command that gets executed as the source for fzf for the CTRL-R keybinding. An empty string disables the CTRL-R binding, which is the supported way to yield CTRL-R to a history manager such as Atuin or McFly. Non-empty custom commands require fzf 0.66.0 or later but are not supported by fzf yet and currently print a shell startup warning. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.fish.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.fish.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.nushell.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.nushell.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.options` | `list of string` | Command line options for the CTRL-R keybinding. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.zsh.command` | `null or string` | Shell-specific override for this widget command. If this is `null`, the global command is used. |
| `programs.fzf.historyWidget.zsh.options` | `null or (list of string)` | Shell-specific override for this widget's command line options. If this is `null`, the global options are used. |
| `programs.fzf.package` | `package` | The fzf package to use. |
| `programs.fzf.tmux.enableShellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable setting `FZF_TMUX=1` which causes shell integration to use fzf-tmux . |
| `programs.fzf.tmux.shellIntegrationOptions` | `list of string` | If {option}`programs.fzf.tmux.enableShellIntegration` is set to `true`, shell integration will use these options for fzf-tmux. See {command}`fzf-tmux --help` for available options. |
